hooks.command: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then jq -nc --arg b "$branch" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:("Refusing to edit while on \($b). Create a feature branch first (e.g. git checkout -b feature/<short-name>), then follow the build/test workflow in AGENTS.md before handing changes back.")}}'; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "${file##*/}" in project.yml) if command -v xcodegen >/dev/null 2>&1; then (cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && xcodegen generate >/tmp/xcodegen-hook.log 2>&1) && jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"project.yml changed — ran `xcodegen generate` to regenerate the .xcodeproj. Build/test next."}}' || jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"project.yml changed but `xcodegen generate` failed — see /tmp/xcodegen-hook.log and regenerate manually before building."}}'; fi ;; esac
